title: Department Manager Vacancy at GAP India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at GAP India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!
